subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Quds 1 (Lawh-i-A'rabi)
subcodes.first_line: My Arabs, My Loved ones, My friends, My legions, My manifestation! Hearken unto My call, if ye be among them with ears to hear
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اعرابی ثم یا احبائی ثم یا اصفیائی ثم یا جنودی ثم یا ظهوری اسمعوا ندائی ان
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @contention and conflict
